name: Seafood Wellington (Chef Axel's Original Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Spread half of the clarified butter on a baking dish.
3. Arrange lobster tails, prawns, and scallops in a single layer.
4. Brush the remaining butter over the seafood.
5. Pour cognac over the top.
6. Roll up tightly and secure with toothpicks.
7. Place seam-side down in the prepared dish.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
